title: Exact Coordinate Geometry Witnesses

solver_reuse.target: coordinate geometry bad midpoint-coordinate and bad squared-distance QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed exact coordinate rows where replay computes midpoint (2,1) but a row claims x-coordinate 3, and computes squared distance 25 but a row claims 26.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional coordinate-geometry rows only when they add distinct midpoint, collinearity, incidence, or exact-distance solver pressure; keep broad synthetic, projective, and differential geometry theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode midpoint and incidence checks as deterministic QF_LRA formulas.
Encode squared-distance checks as deterministic NRA-shadow formulas with exact replay.
Replay SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Emit checked coordinate counterexample evidence; the bad midpoint-coordinate and bad squared-distance rows now have checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after exact replay.
Add non-incidence and rigid-configuration examples once proof routes for polynomial constraints are explicit.
